reviewChecklistBeforeSanityImport: Confirm each source page is official and in scope.
Confirm each candidateLogoUrl is a logo/mark and not a sponsor, editorial image, or partner asset.
Extract and validate official colour values before populating colour fields.
Set approvedForEditorialUse to false for all imports unless manually reviewed later.
Prefer uploading approved logo files to Sanity assets rather than hotlinking external URLs.
Record sourceUrl, rightsHolder, rightsStatus and usageNotes before any public template usage.
